prose: The Fukui reactivity analysis performed using chemkit with DFT at the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, indicates that the most electrophilic atom is the carbon labeled 4 (atom index 3), with an electrophilicity value of approximately 0.4964. The most nucleophilic atom is the carbon labeled 5 (atom index 4), with a nucleophilicity value of about 0.1073. Warnings include charge conservation drift suggesting possible convergence issues with the N±1 states.
